message:
test(connectors): add integration tests, GCP compliance e2e, and verification scripts

New test infrastructure for the V3 readiness connectors:

- connectors/aws/tests/integration.rs (235L): Integration test suite
  covering S3 CRUD, EC2 operations, Lambda invocation, and STS
  identity with wiremock-based deterministic testing.

- connectors/gcp/tests/integration.rs (288L): Integration test suite
  covering GCS, GCE, Cloud Functions, and IAM operations.

- connectors/mysql/tests/integration.rs (252L): Integration test suite
  covering query execution, schema introspection, health checks, and
  error handling against a mock MySQL REST proxy.

- crates/fcp-e2e/tests/gcp_compliance_e2e.rs (381L): End-to-end
  compliance test verifying GCP connector against V3 contract
  requirements including readiness, doctor output, and operation
  safety tier enforcement.

- scripts/e2e/aws_connector_verification.sh (209L): Replayable
  verification script for AWS connector via rch.
- scripts/e2e/firebase_connector_verification.sh (124L): Firebase
  connector verification script.
- scripts/e2e/gcp_connector_verification.sh (222L): GCP connector
  verification script.
- scripts/e2e/mysql_connector_verification.sh (124L): MySQL connector
  verification script.

Also: Cargo.lock updated for new dependencies, fcp-e2e Cargo.toml
updated, beads issue tracking metadata synced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","title":"GCP: readiness, compliance, verification, and operator guidance","description":"Finish GCP with readiness and doctor outputs, project and IAM remediation guidance, deterministic tests across each included GCP service slice, and explicit V3 compliance evidence that proves the connector behaves predictably under auth, quota, and API failure conditions.","acceptance_criteria":"- closeout requires comprehensive deterministic unit coverage for auth, timeout, retry, error-mapping, pagination or state transitions, and the highest-risk provider-specific mutations
- closeout requires archetype-appropriate integration coverage built on shared `fcp-testkit` helpers rather than connector-local one-offs
- closeout requires at least one replayable E2E or host-backed verification script that runs through `rch`, captures detailed structured logs, and preserves manifest, readiness, doctor, and conformance artifacts
- operator guidance must name prerequisites, dedicated environments, redaction rules, common remediation paths, and rerun commands for the verification bundle
- evidence attached to the bead must be sufficient for a future agent to rerun verification without reopening external planning notes","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:28:29.064107Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:19:01.009265Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:34.492028Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","title":"[T1-CLOUD.3] fcp.azure — Azure Cloud Connector (VMs, Functions, Storage, Service Bus)","description":"Azure cloud connector for core Microsoft Azure services. Partial coverage exists via Microsoft365 connector but dedicated Azure infra connector needed. Operations: azure.vm.list, azure.vm.start/stop/restart; azure.functions.invoke, azure.functions.list; azure.storage.list_blobs, azure.storage.upload/download_blob; azure.servicebus.send_message, azure.servicebus.receive_messages; azure.resource_groups.list. Auth: Azure AD OAuth2 with service principal (client_id/client_secret/tenant_id). Network: *.azure.com, *.core.windows.net, login.microsoftonline.com. REST APIs throughout. 4 subtasks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:56:56.649857Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:02.797686Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:56:56.649857Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1789,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","author":"jemanuel","text":"Testing requirements: 50+ unit tests (wiremock), 10+ integration tests (ConnectorSuite/ComplianceSuite), E2E compliance script, structured JSON logging with connector_id/operation_id/duration_ms, retry telemetry with attempt/delay_ms/error. All tests deterministic, no real API calls, no timing-based flakiness.","created_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:02Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","title":"Azure: V3 contract, scope, auth model, and service inventory","description":"Define the V3 contract for Azure. Pin down the exact first-slice service inventory across VMs, Functions, Storage, and Service Bus, the auth boundary around Azure AD and tenant or subscription scoping, OperationInfo safety and risk semantics, and explicit non-goals for the first implementation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:43:18.044764Z","closed_at":"2026-03-18T06:43:10.382396Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:03:48.943500Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1844,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"V3 contract for Azure:

**Archetype**: Cloud Control Plane (multi-service)
**Auth model**: Service principal (client_id + client_secret + tenant_id) or Managed Identity. Subscription ID required. OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow to login.microsoftonline.com.
**Network**: *.azure.com:443, management.azure.com:443, login.microsoftonline.com:443. TLS required.

**Operations (first slice — VM/Storage/App Service focus)**:
| Operation | SafetyTier | RiskLevel | IdempotencyClass | Capability |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| azure.vm.list | Safe | Low | None | azure.compute.read |
| azure.vm.get | Safe | Low | None | azure.compute.read |
| azure.vm.start | Risky | Medium | Strict | azure.compute.write |
| azure.vm.stop | Risky | Medium | Strict | azure.compute.write |
| azure.vm.delete | Dangerous | Critical | Strict | azure.compute.write |
| azure.storage.list_containers | Safe | Low | None | azure.storage.read |
| azure.storage.upload_blob | Risky | Medium | Strict | azure.storage.write |
| azure.storage.download_blob | Safe | Low | None | azure.storage.read |
| azure.storage.delete_blob | Dangerous | High | Strict | azure.storage.write |
| azure.appservice.list_apps | Safe | Low | None | azure.app.read |
| azure.appservice.deploy | Risky | High | Strict | azure.app.write |
| azure.subscription.get | Safe | Low | None | azure.iam.read |
| azure.health | Safe | Low | Strict | azure.iam.read |

**Safety policy**: VM delete = Dangerous/Critical. Blob delete = Dangerous/High. Deploy = Risky/High. RBAC management deferred. Subscription/resource group scoping explicit in every operation.

**Provisioning**: Service principal creation in Azure AD. Doctor: subscription.get validates auth.

**Non-goals (first slice)**: No RBAC/IAM management, no AKS, no Azure SQL (use database connectors), no Azure DevOps, no Cosmos DB, no Azure Functions management.","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:42:46Z"}]}

Verification: `fwc manifest fix connectors/azure/manifest.toml --check --json`, `rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-azure --all-targets`, and `rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-azure --all-targets -- -D warnings` all passed; `rch` artifact retrieval still warns because of deeply nested `.beads` recovery paths.","created_at":"2026-03-20T22:36:45Z"}]}

- closeout requires archetype-appropriate integration coverage built on shared `fcp-testkit` helpers rather than connector-local one-offs
- closeout requires at least one replayable E2E or host-backed verification script that runs through `rch`, captures detailed structured logs, and preserves manifest, readiness, doctor, and conformance artifacts

- evidence attached to the bead must be sufficient for a future agent to rerun verification without reopening external planning notes","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:28:29.086912Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:20:19.390075Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.3.3","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:17.952930Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","title":"[T1-CLOUD.4] fcp.cloudflare — Cloudflare Workers, R2, D1, KV, DNS Connector","description":"Cloudflare edge platform connector. Increasingly critical for edge compute, storage, and DNS. Operations: cf.workers.list/deploy/delete, cf.workers.tail_logs; cf.r2.list_buckets, cf.r2.list_objects, cf.r2.put/get/delete_object; cf.d1.query, cf.d1.list_databases; cf.kv.get/put/delete/list; cf.dns.list_zones, cf.dns.list_records, cf.dns.create/update/delete_record. Auth: API token or API key+email. Network: api.cloudflare.com. REST API throughout, well-documented. Workers deploy = Dangerous tier. DNS mutation = Dangerous tier. KV/R2 = Risky. 4 subtasks.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:57:09.135021Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:03.104361Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-17T21:57:09.135021Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1790,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","author":"jemanuel","text":"Testing requirements: 50+ unit tests (wiremock), 10+ integration tests (ConnectorSuite/ComplianceSuite), E2E compliance script, structured JSON logging with connector_id/operation_id/duration_ms, retry telemetry with attempt/delay_ms/error. All tests deterministic, no real API calls, no timing-based flakiness.","created_at":"2026-03-18T00:25:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","title":"Cloudflare: V3 contract, scope, auth model, and service inventory","description":"Define the V3 contract for Cloudflare. Pin down the exact first-slice service inventory across Workers, R2, D1, KV, and DNS, the auth boundary around API tokens and account or zone scoping, OperationInfo safety and risk semantics, and explicit non-goals for the first implementation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-18T06:44:12.237393Z","closed_at":"2026-03-18T06:44:12.236986Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.11.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-18T01:04:32.478347Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1845,"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-j05nu.2.4.1","author":"jemanuel","text":"V3 contract for Cloudflare:

**Archetype**: Cloud Control Plane (edge infrastructure)
**Auth model**: API Token (scoped) or Global API Key + Email. API Token recommended (least-privilege). Bearer token auth.
**Network**: api.cloudflare.com:443. TLS required.

**Operations (first slice — Workers/Pages/DNS/KV focus)**:
| Operation | SafetyTier | RiskLevel | IdempotencyClass | Capability |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| cloudflare.workers.list | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.workers.read |
| cloudflare.workers.get | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.workers.read |
| cloudflare.workers.deploy | Risky | High | Strict | cloudflare.workers.write |
| cloudflare.workers.delete | Dangerous | Critical | Strict | cloudflare.workers.write |
| cloudflare.pages.list_projects | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.pages.read |
| cloudflare.pages.create_deployment | Risky | High | Strict | cloudflare.pages.write |
| cloudflare.dns.list_records | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.dns.read |
| cloudflare.dns.create_record | Risky | Medium | Strict | cloudflare.dns.write |
| cloudflare.dns.update_record | Risky | Medium | Strict | cloudflare.dns.write |
| cloudflare.dns.delete_record | Dangerous | High | Strict | cloudflare.dns.write |
| cloudflare.kv.get | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.kv.read |
| cloudflare.kv.put | Risky | Medium | Strict | cloudflare.kv.write |
| cloudflare.kv.delete | Dangerous | High | Strict | cloudflare.kv.write |
| cloudflare.zones.list | Safe | Low | None | cloudflare.zones.read |
| cloudflare.health | Safe | Low | Strict | cloudflare.zones.read |

**Safety policy**: Worker/DNS delete = Dangerous (affects live traffic). Deploy = Risky/High (replaces running code). Zone ID scoping required for zone-specific operations.

**Provisioning**: Create API token at dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens. Doctor: zones.list validates token.

**Non-goals (first slice)**: No R2 storage management, no D1 database, no Queues, no WAF/firewall rules, no Access/Zero Trust, no registrar management.","created_at":"2026-03-18T06:44:02Z"}]}

@@ -0,0 +1,381 @@
+//! E2E GCP connector compliance tests.
+//!
+//! Exercises the GCP connector through the shared E2E harness:
+//! - Default deny behavior for capability mismatch
+//! - Allow path with valid capability token
+//! - Network guard allow/deny checks via manifest constraints
+//!
+//! All tests are deterministic with mock servers only.
+//! Run: `cargo test --package fcp-e2e --features gcp --test gcp_compliance_e2e`
+
+#![cfg(feature = "gcp")]
+#![allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
+
+use chrono::{Duration as ChronoDuration, Utc};
+use fcp_conformance::DynamicSuite;
+use fcp_core::{
+    CapabilityId, CapabilityToken, ConnectorId, HandshakeRequest, InstanceId, InvokeRequest,
+    InvokeStatus, OperationId, RequestId, ZoneId,
+};
+use fcp_crypto::{cose::CapabilityTokenBuilder, ed25519::Ed25519SigningKey};
+use fcp_e2e::{
+    ComplianceSuite, ConnectorSuite, E2eReport, E2eRunner, InvokeExpectations, scan_log_jsonl,
+    validate_log_entry_value,
+};
+use fcp_gcp::connector::GcpConnector;
+use fcp_manifest::ConnectorManifest;
+use fcp_testkit::MockApiServer;
+use serde_json::json;
+use wiremock::{
+    Mock, ResponseTemplate,
+    matchers::{method, path},
+};
+
+fn gcp_manifest_with_hash() -> String {
+    let raw = include_str!("../../../connectors/gcp/manifest.toml");
+    let unchecked = ConnectorManifest::parse_str_unchecked(raw).expect("unchecked manifest parse");
+    let computed = unchecked
+        .compute_interface_hash()
+        .expect("compute interface hash");
+    raw.replace(
+        &unchecked.manifest.interface_hash.to_string(),
+        &computed.to_string(),
+    )
+}
+
+fn gcp_manifest_toml() -> toml::Value {
+    toml::from_str(include_str!("../../../connectors/gcp/manifest.toml"))
+        .expect("gcp manifest TOML")
+}
+
+fn gcp_config(base_url: &str) -> serde_json::Value {
+    json!({
+        "mode": "access_token",
+        "access_token": "ya29_test_e2e",
+        "project_id": "test-project",
+        "compute_base_url": base_url,
+        "storage_base_url": base_url,
+        "run_base_url": base_url,
+        "crm_base_url": base_url,
+        "retry": { "max_retries": 0 },
+    })
+}
+
+fn handshake_request(host_public_key: [u8; 32], capabilities: &[&str]) -> HandshakeRequest {
+    HandshakeRequest {
+        protocol_version: "2.0".to_string(),
+        zone: ZoneId::work(),
+        zone_dir: None,
+        host_public_key,
+        nonce: [9u8; 32],
+        capabilities_requested: capabilities
+            .iter()
+            .map(|cap| cap.parse::<CapabilityId>().expect("capability id parse"))
+            .collect(),
+        host: None,
+        transport_caps: None,
+        requested_instance_id: Some(InstanceId::new()),
+    }
+}
+
+fn build_token(
+    signing_key: &Ed25519SigningKey,
+    capability: &str,
+    operations: &[&str],
+) -> CapabilityToken {
+    let now = Utc::now();
+    let cose = CapabilityTokenBuilder::new()
+        .capability_id(capability)
+        .zone_id("z:work")
+        .principal("user:test")
+        .operations(operations)
+        .issuer("node:test")
+        .validity(now, now + ChronoDuration::hours(1))
+        .sign(signing_key)
+        .expect("capability token sign");
+    CapabilityToken { raw: cose }
+}
+
+fn invoke_request(
+    operation: &'static str,
+    input: serde_json::Value,
+    token: CapabilityToken,
+) -> InvokeRequest {
+    InvokeRequest {
+        r#type: "invoke".to_string(),
+        id: RequestId::from("gcp-e2e"),
+        connector_id: ConnectorId::from_static("fcp.gcp"),
+        operation: OperationId::from_static(operation),
+        zone_id: ZoneId::work(),
+        input,
+        capability_token: token,
+        holder_proof: None,
+        context: None,
+        idempotency_key: None,
+        lease_seq: None,
+        deadline_ms: None,
+        correlation_id: None,
+        provenance: None,
+        approval_tokens: Vec::new(),
+    }
+}
+
+fn operation_host_allow_list(manifest: &toml::Value, operation_name: &str) -> Vec<String> {
+    manifest
+        .get("provides")
+        .and_then(toml::Value::as_table)
+        .and_then(|provides| provides.get("operations"))
+        .and_then(toml::Value::as_table)
+        .and_then(|operations| operations.get(operation_name))
+        .and_then(toml::Value::as_table)
+        .and_then(|operation| operation.get("network_constraints"))
+        .and_then(toml::Value::as_table)
+        .and_then(|constraints| constraints.get("host_allow"))
+        .and_then(toml::Value::as_array)
+        .expect("host_allow array")
+        .iter()
+        .map(|value| {
+            value
+                .as_str()
+                .expect("host allow entry should be a string")
+                .to_string()
+        })
+        .collect()
+}
+
+fn assert_report_logs_validate(report: &E2eReport) {
+    let jsonl = report.to_stable_json_lines();
+    assert!(
+        !jsonl.trim().is_empty(),
+        "report should emit stable JSONL evidence"
+    );
+
+    let first_line = jsonl.lines().next().expect("at least one JSONL line");
+    let first_value: serde_json::Value =
+        serde_json::from_str(first_line).expect("first JSONL line should parse");
+    assert_eq!(
+        first_value
+            .get("timestamp")
+            .and_then(serde_json::Value::as_str),
+        Some("1970-01-01T00:00:00Z")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        first_value
+            .get("correlation_id")
+            .and_then(serde_json::Value::as_str),
+        Some("00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        first_value
+            .get("duration_ms")
+            .and_then(serde_json::Value::as_u64),
+        Some(0)
+    );
+
+    for line in jsonl.lines() {
+        let value: serde_json::Value = serde_json::from_str(line).expect("jsonl line should parse");
+        validate_log_entry_value(&value).expect("jsonl line should satisfy E2E schema");
+    }
+
+    let scan = scan_log_jsonl(&jsonl);
+    assert_eq!(scan.error_count, 0, "stable evidence should scan cleanly");
+}
+
+#[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]
+async fn gcp_default_deny_compliance_suite_passes() {
+    let mock = MockApiServer::start().await;
+
+    let mut connector = GcpConnector::new();
+    let signing_key = Ed25519SigningKey::generate();
+    let handshake = handshake_request(
+        signing_key.verifying_key().to_bytes(),
+        &["gcp.compute.read"],
+    );
+    let token = build_token(
+        &signing_key,
+        "gcp.compute.read",
+        &["gcp.compute.list_instances"],
+    );
+    let invoke = invoke_request(
+        "gcp.run.delete_service",
+        json!({ "location": "us-central1", "service": "dangerous-service" }),
+        token,
+    );
+
+    let dynamic = DynamicSuite {
+        config: gcp_config(&mock.base_url()),
+        handshake,
+        invoke: Some(invoke),
+        expect_invoke_error: true,
+        simulate: None,
+        expect_simulate_would_succeed: None,
+        require_simulate_denial_details: false,
+        require_capability_denial: true,
+        require_decision_receipt: false,
+    };
+    let suite = ComplianceSuite::new("gcp_default_deny", gcp_manifest_with_hash(), dynamic);
+
+    let mut runner = E2eRunner::new("fcp-e2e-gcp");
+    let report = runner
+        .run_compliance_suite(&mut connector, suite)
+        .await
+        .expect("compliance suite run");
+
+    assert!(
+        report.passed,
+        "default deny compliance should pass: {report:#?}"
+    );
+    assert_report_logs_validate(&report);
+}
+
+#[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]
+async fn gcp_happy_path_compute_list_suite_passes() {
+    let mock = MockApiServer::start().await;
+
+    Mock::given(method("GET"))
+        .and(path(
+            "/compute/v1/projects/test-project/zones/us-central1-a/instances",
+        ))
+        .respond_with(ResponseTemplate::new(200).set_body_json(json!({ "items": [] })))
+        .mount(mock.inner())
+        .await;
+
+    let mut connector = GcpConnector::new();
+    let signing_key = Ed25519SigningKey::generate();
+    let handshake = handshake_request(
+        signing_key.verifying_key().to_bytes(),
+        &["gcp.compute.read"],
+    );
+    let token = build_token(
+        &signing_key,
+        "gcp.compute.read",
+        &["gcp.compute.list_instances"],
+    );
+    let invoke = invoke_request(
+        "gcp.compute.list_instances",
+        json!({ "zone": "us-central1-a" }),
+        token,
+    );
+
+    let suite = ConnectorSuite {
+        test_name: "gcp_compute_list_instances".to_string(),
+        config: gcp_config(&mock.base_url()),
+        handshake,
+        invoke: Some(invoke),
+        invoke_expectations: InvokeExpectations {
+            expect_error: false,
+            expect_decision_receipt: false,
+            expect_audit_event: false,
+            expect_receipt: false,
+            expected_reason_code: None,
+            rate_limit_pool: None,
+        },
+    };
+
+    let mut runner = E2eRunner::new("fcp-e2e-gcp-happy");
+    let report = runner
+        .run_connector_suite(&mut connector, suite)
+        .await
+        .expect("connector suite run");
+
+    assert!(report.passed, "happy path should pass: {report:#?}");
+    let invoke_entry = report
+        .logs
+        .iter()
+        .find(|entry| entry.context.get("operation") == Some(&json!("invoke")))
+        .expect("invoke entry");
+    assert_eq!(invoke_entry.result, "pass");
+    assert_eq!(
+        invoke_entry.context.get("invoke_status"),
+        Some(&json!(format!("{:?}", InvokeStatus::Ok)))
+    );
+    assert_report_logs_validate(&report);
+}
+
+#[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]
+async fn gcp_dangerous_storage_delete_emits_stable_evidence() {
+    let mock = MockApiServer::start().await;
+
+    Mock::given(method("DELETE"))
+        .and(path("/storage/v1/b/test-bucket/o/artifact.txt"))
+        .respond_with(ResponseTemplate::new(200).set_body_json(json!({
+            "deleted": true,
+            "target": "artifact.txt"
+        })))
+        .mount(mock.inner())
+        .await;
+
+    let mut connector = GcpConnector::new();
+    let signing_key = Ed25519SigningKey::generate();
+    let handshake = handshake_request(
+        signing_key.verifying_key().to_bytes(),
+        &["gcp.storage.write"],
+    );
+    let token = build_token(
+        &signing_key,
+        "gcp.storage.write",
+        &["gcp.storage.delete_object"],
+    );
+    let invoke = invoke_request(
+        "gcp.storage.delete_object",
+        json!({ "bucket": "test-bucket", "object": "artifact.txt" }),
+        token,
+    );
+
+    let suite = ConnectorSuite {
+        test_name: "gcp_storage_delete".to_string(),
+        config: gcp_config(&mock.base_url()),
+        handshake,
+        invoke: Some(invoke),
+        invoke_expectations: InvokeExpectations {
+            expect_error: false,
+            expect_decision_receipt: false,
+            expect_audit_event: false,
+            expect_receipt: false,
+            expected_reason_code: None,
+            rate_limit_pool: None,
+        },
+    };
+
+    let mut runner = E2eRunner::new("fcp-e2e-gcp-delete");
+    let report = runner
+        .run_connector_suite(&mut connector, suite)
+        .await
+        .expect("dangerous delete suite run");
+
+    assert!(
+        report.passed,
+        "dangerous delete evidence suite should pass: {report:#?}"
+    );
+    assert_report_logs_validate(&report);
+}
+
+#[test]
+fn gcp_manifest_network_guards_map_to_service_hosts() {
+    let manifest = gcp_manifest_toml();
+    let expected = [
+        ("gcp.compute.list_instances", "compute.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.compute.get_instance", "compute.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.compute.start_instance", "compute.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.compute.stop_instance", "compute.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.compute.delete_instance", "compute.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.storage.list_objects", "storage.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.storage.get_object", "storage.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.storage.upload_object", "storage.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.storage.delete_object", "storage.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.run.list_services", "run.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.run.deploy_service", "run.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.run.delete_service", "run.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.projects.get", "cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"),
+        ("gcp.health", "cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"),
+    ];
+
+    for (operation_name, expected_host) in expected {
+        let host_allow = operation_host_allow_list(&manifest, operation_name);
+        assert_eq!(
+            host_allow,
+            vec![expected_host.to_string()],
+            "operation {operation_name} should use the exact service host"
+        );
+    }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,209 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -uo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
+RUN_ID="${RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
+OUT_ROOT="${OUT_ROOT:-${REPO_ROOT}/artifacts/e2e/aws_connector/${RUN_ID}}"
+
+mkdir -p "${OUT_ROOT}/logs" "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence"
+
+OVERALL_STATUS="ok"
+EXIT_CODE=0
+
+manifest_status="pending"
+manifest_note=""
+cargo_check_status="pending"
+format_check_status="pending"
+doctor_self_check_status="pending"
+retryable_self_check_status="pending"
+risky_mutation_status="pending"
+integration_suite_status="pending"
+clippy_status="pending"
+
+require_cmd() {
+  if ! command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    echo "Missing required command: $1" >&2
+    exit 1
+  fi
+}
+
+run_logged() {
+  local name="$1"
+  shift
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[aws-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${log_path}" 2>&1
+}
+
+run_capture_stdout() {
+  local name="$1"
+  local stdout_path="$2"
+  shift 2
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[aws-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${stdout_path}" 2>"${log_path}"
+}
+
+promote_overall_status() {
+  local next_status="$1"
+  case "${next_status}" in
+    failed)
+      OVERALL_STATUS="failed"
+      EXIT_CODE=1
+      ;;
+    infra_blocked)
+      if [[ "${OVERALL_STATUS}" == "ok" ]]; then
+        OVERALL_STATUS="infra_blocked"
+        EXIT_CODE=2
+      fi
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+classify_manifest_failure() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  if grep -Eq 'missing worker system package dbus-1\.pc|The system library `dbus-1` required|pkg-config --libs --cflags dbus-1' "${log_path}"; then
+    echo "infra_blocked"
+  else
+    echo "failed"
+  fi
+}
+
+require_cmd rch
+
+if run_capture_stdout \
+  manifest_check \
+  "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json" \
+  rch exec -- cargo run -q -p fwc -- manifest fix connectors/aws/manifest.toml --check --json
+then
+  manifest_status="passed"
+else
+  manifest_status="$(classify_manifest_failure "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/manifest_check.log")"
+  if [[ "${manifest_status}" == "infra_blocked" ]]; then
+    manifest_note="rch worker image missing dbus-1.pc while building fwc for manifest validation"
+  else
+    manifest_note="manifest validation command failed; inspect logs/manifest_check.log"
+  fi
+  cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "status": "${manifest_status}",
+  "note": "${manifest_note}",
+  "log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/manifest_check.log"
+}
+EOF
+  promote_overall_status "${manifest_status}"
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  cargo_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo check -p fcp-aws --all-targets
+then
+  cargo_check_status="passed"
+else
+  cargo_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  format_check \
+  cargo fmt -p fcp-aws --check
+then
+  format_check_status="passed"
+else
+  format_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  doctor_self_check_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-aws --test integration self_check_ready_with_custom_sts_override_and_evidence -- --nocapture
+then
+  doctor_self_check_status="passed"
+else
+  doctor_self_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  retryable_self_check_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-aws --test integration self_check_retryable_sts_failure_reports_degraded -- --nocapture
+then
+  retryable_self_check_status="passed"
+else
+  retryable_self_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  risky_mutation_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-aws --test integration invoke_dangerous_s3_delete_preserves_artifact_evidence -- --nocapture
+then
+  risky_mutation_status="passed"
+else
+  risky_mutation_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  integration_suite \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-aws --test integration -- --nocapture
+then
+  integration_suite_status="passed"
+else
+  integration_suite_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  clippy \
+  rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-aws --all-targets -- -D warnings
+then
+  clippy_status="passed"
+else
+  clippy_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/summary.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "run_id": "${RUN_ID}",
+  "connector": "fcp-aws",
+  "overall_status": "${OVERALL_STATUS}",
+  "artifacts_root": "${OUT_ROOT}",
+  "steps": {
+    "manifest_check": {
+      "status": "${manifest_status}",
+      "note": "${manifest_note}"
+    },
+    "cargo_check": "${cargo_check_status}",
+    "format_check": "${format_check_status}",
+    "doctor_self_check_evidence": "${doctor_self_check_status}",
+    "retryable_self_check_evidence": "${retryable_self_check_status}",
+    "risky_mutation_evidence": "${risky_mutation_status}",
+    "integration_suite": "${integration_suite_status}",
+    "clippy": "${clippy_status}"
+  },
+  "artifacts": {
+    "manifest_check": "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json",
+    "cargo_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/cargo_check.log",
+    "format_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/format_check.log",
+    "doctor_self_check_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/doctor_self_check_evidence.log",
+    "retryable_self_check_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/retryable_self_check_evidence.log",
+    "risky_mutation_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/risky_mutation_evidence.log",
+    "integration_suite_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/integration_suite.log",
+    "clippy_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/clippy.log"
+  }
+}
+EOF
+
+echo "AWS verification artifacts written to ${OUT_ROOT}"
+exit "${EXIT_CODE}"

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
+RUN_ID="${RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
+OUT_ROOT="${OUT_ROOT:-${REPO_ROOT}/artifacts/e2e/firebase_connector/${RUN_ID}}"
+
+mkdir -p "${OUT_ROOT}/logs" "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence"
+
+require_cmd() {
+  if ! command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    echo "Missing required command: $1" >&2
+    exit 1
+  fi
+}
+
+run_logged() {
+  local name="$1"
+  shift
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[firebase-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${log_path}" 2>&1
+}
+
+run_capture_stdout() {
+  local name="$1"
+  local stdout_path="$2"
+  shift 2
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[firebase-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${stdout_path}" 2>"${log_path}"
+}
+
+require_cmd fwc
+require_cmd rch
+
+run_capture_stdout \
+  manifest_check \
+  "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json" \
+  fwc manifest fix connectors/firebase/manifest.toml --check --json
+
+run_logged \
+  cargo_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo check -p fcp-firebase --all-targets
+
+run_logged \
+  format_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo fmt -p fcp-firebase -- --check
+
+run_logged \
+  doctor_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration doctor_unconfigured_reports_operator_guidance -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  self_check_secretless_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration self_check_secretless_requires_injection_and_evidence -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  compliance_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration introspection_emits_operation_compliance_evidence -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  integration_suite \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  clippy \
+  rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-firebase --all-targets -- -D warnings
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/environment.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "run_id": "${RUN_ID}",
+  "connector": "fcp-firebase",
+  "repo_root": "${REPO_ROOT}",
+  "verification_script": "scripts/e2e/firebase_connector_verification.sh",
+  "artifact_root": "${OUT_ROOT}"
+}
+EOF
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/replay.sh" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+fwc manifest fix connectors/firebase/manifest.toml --check --json
+rch exec -- cargo check -p fcp-firebase --all-targets
+rch exec -- cargo fmt -p fcp-firebase -- --check
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration doctor_unconfigured_reports_operator_guidance -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration self_check_secretless_requires_injection_and_evidence -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration introspection_emits_operation_compliance_evidence -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-firebase --test integration -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-firebase --all-targets -- -D warnings
+EOF
+chmod +x "${OUT_ROOT}/replay.sh"
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/summary.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "run_id": "${RUN_ID}",
+  "connector": "fcp-firebase",
+  "artifacts_root": "${OUT_ROOT}",
+  "artifacts": {
+    "manifest_check": "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json",
+    "cargo_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/cargo_check.log",
+    "format_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/format_check.log",
+    "doctor_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/doctor_evidence.log",
+    "self_check_secretless_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/self_check_secretless_evidence.log",
+    "compliance_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/compliance_evidence.log",
+    "integration_suite_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/integration_suite.log",
+    "clippy_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/clippy.log",
+    "environment": "${OUT_ROOT}/environment.json",
+    "replay": "${OUT_ROOT}/replay.sh"
+  }
+}
+EOF
+
+echo "Firebase verification artifacts written to ${OUT_ROOT}"

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -uo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
+RUN_ID="${RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
+OUT_ROOT="${OUT_ROOT:-${REPO_ROOT}/artifacts/e2e/gcp_connector/${RUN_ID}}"
+
+mkdir -p "${OUT_ROOT}/logs" "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence"
+
+OVERALL_STATUS="ok"
+EXIT_CODE=0
+
+manifest_status="pending"
+manifest_note=""
+cargo_check_status="pending"
+format_check_status="pending"
+doctor_self_check_status="pending"
+retryable_self_check_status="pending"
+risky_mutation_status="pending"
+integration_suite_status="pending"
+e2e_suite_status="pending"
+clippy_status="pending"
+
+require_cmd() {
+  if ! command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    echo "Missing required command: $1" >&2
+    exit 1
+  fi
+}
+
+run_logged() {
+  local name="$1"
+  shift
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[gcp-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${log_path}" 2>&1
+}
+
+run_capture_stdout() {
+  local name="$1"
+  local stdout_path="$2"
+  shift 2
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[gcp-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${stdout_path}" 2>"${log_path}"
+}
+
+promote_overall_status() {
+  local next_status="$1"
+  case "${next_status}" in
+    failed)
+      OVERALL_STATUS="failed"
+      EXIT_CODE=1
+      ;;
+    infra_blocked)
+      if [[ "${OVERALL_STATUS}" == "ok" ]]; then
+        OVERALL_STATUS="infra_blocked"
+        EXIT_CODE=2
+      fi
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+classify_manifest_failure() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  if grep -Eq 'missing worker system package dbus-1\.pc|The system library `dbus-1` required|pkg-config --libs --cflags dbus-1' "${log_path}"; then
+    echo "infra_blocked"
+  else
+    echo "failed"
+  fi
+}
+
+require_cmd rch
+
+if run_capture_stdout \
+  manifest_check \
+  "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json" \
+  rch exec -- cargo run -q -p fwc -- manifest fix connectors/gcp/manifest.toml --check --json
+then
+  manifest_status="passed"
+else
+  manifest_status="$(classify_manifest_failure "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/manifest_check.log")"
+  if [[ "${manifest_status}" == "infra_blocked" ]]; then
+    manifest_note="rch worker image missing dbus-1.pc while building fwc for manifest validation"
+  else
+    manifest_note="manifest validation command failed; inspect logs/manifest_check.log"
+  fi
+  cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "status": "${manifest_status}",
+  "note": "${manifest_note}",
+  "log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/manifest_check.log"
+}
+EOF
+  promote_overall_status "${manifest_status}"
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  cargo_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo check -p fcp-gcp
+then
+  cargo_check_status="passed"
+else
+  cargo_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  format_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
+then
+  format_check_status="passed"
+else
+  format_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  doctor_self_check_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-gcp --test integration self_check_ready_with_access_token_and_evidence -- --nocapture
+then
+  doctor_self_check_status="passed"
+else
+  doctor_self_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  retryable_self_check_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-gcp --test integration self_check_retryable_project_api_failure_reports_degraded -- --nocapture
+then
+  retryable_self_check_status="passed"
+else
+  retryable_self_check_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  risky_mutation_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-gcp --test integration invoke_dangerous_storage_delete_preserves_artifact_evidence -- --nocapture
+then
+  risky_mutation_status="passed"
+else
+  risky_mutation_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  integration_suite \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-gcp --test integration -- --nocapture
+then
+  integration_suite_status="passed"
+else
+  integration_suite_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  e2e_suite \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-e2e --features gcp --test gcp_compliance_e2e -- --nocapture
+then
+  e2e_suite_status="passed"
+else
+  e2e_suite_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+if run_logged \
+  clippy \
+  rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-gcp --all-targets -- -D warnings
+then
+  clippy_status="passed"
+else
+  clippy_status="failed"
+  promote_overall_status failed
+fi
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/summary.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "run_id": "${RUN_ID}",
+  "connector": "fcp-gcp",
+  "overall_status": "${OVERALL_STATUS}",
+  "artifacts_root": "${OUT_ROOT}",
+  "steps": {
+    "manifest_check": {
+      "status": "${manifest_status}",
+      "note": "${manifest_note}"
+    },
+    "cargo_check": "${cargo_check_status}",
+    "format_check": "${format_check_status}",
+    "doctor_self_check_evidence": "${doctor_self_check_status}",
+    "retryable_self_check_evidence": "${retryable_self_check_status}",
+    "risky_mutation_evidence": "${risky_mutation_status}",
+    "integration_suite": "${integration_suite_status}",
+    "e2e_suite": "${e2e_suite_status}",
+    "clippy": "${clippy_status}"
+  },
+  "artifacts": {
+    "manifest_check": "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json",
+    "cargo_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/cargo_check.log",
+    "format_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/format_check.log",
+    "doctor_self_check_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/doctor_self_check_evidence.log",
+    "retryable_self_check_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/retryable_self_check_evidence.log",
+    "risky_mutation_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/risky_mutation_evidence.log",
+    "integration_suite_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/integration_suite.log",
+    "e2e_suite_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/e2e_suite.log",
+    "clippy_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/clippy.log"
+  }
+}
+EOF
+
+echo "GCP verification artifacts written to ${OUT_ROOT}"
+exit "${EXIT_CODE}"

@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
+RUN_ID="${RUN_ID:-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
+OUT_ROOT="${OUT_ROOT:-${REPO_ROOT}/artifacts/e2e/mysql_connector/${RUN_ID}}"
+
+mkdir -p "${OUT_ROOT}/logs" "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence"
+
+require_cmd() {
+  if ! command -v "$1" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    echo "Missing required command: $1" >&2
+    exit 1
+  fi
+}
+
+run_logged() {
+  local name="$1"
+  shift
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[mysql-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${log_path}" 2>&1
+}
+
+run_capture_stdout() {
+  local name="$1"
+  local stdout_path="$2"
+  shift 2
+  local log_path="${OUT_ROOT}/logs/${name}.log"
+
+  echo "[mysql-verification] ${name}: $*"
+  (
+    cd "${REPO_ROOT}"
+    "$@"
+  ) >"${stdout_path}" 2>"${log_path}"
+}
+
+require_cmd fwc
+require_cmd rch
+
+run_capture_stdout \
+  manifest_check \
+  "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json" \
+  fwc manifest fix connectors/mysql/manifest.toml --check --json
+
+run_logged \
+  cargo_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo check -p fcp-mysql --all-targets
+
+run_logged \
+  format_check \
+  rch exec -- cargo fmt -p fcp-mysql -- --check
+
+run_logged \
+  doctor_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration doctor_unconfigured_reports_operator_guidance -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  self_check_secretless_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration self_check_secretless_requires_injection_and_evidence -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  compliance_evidence \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration introspection_emits_mutation_approval_evidence -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  integration_suite \
+  rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration -- --nocapture
+
+run_logged \
+  clippy \
+  rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-mysql --all-targets -- -D warnings
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/environment.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "run_id": "${RUN_ID}",
+  "connector": "fcp-mysql",
+  "repo_root": "${REPO_ROOT}",
+  "verification_script": "scripts/e2e/mysql_connector_verification.sh",
+  "artifact_root": "${OUT_ROOT}"
+}
+EOF
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/replay.sh" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+fwc manifest fix connectors/mysql/manifest.toml --check --json
+rch exec -- cargo check -p fcp-mysql --all-targets
+rch exec -- cargo fmt -p fcp-mysql -- --check
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration doctor_unconfigured_reports_operator_guidance -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration self_check_secretless_requires_injection_and_evidence -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration introspection_emits_mutation_approval_evidence -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test -p fcp-mysql --test integration -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fcp-mysql --all-targets -- -D warnings
+EOF
+chmod +x "${OUT_ROOT}/replay.sh"
+
+cat > "${OUT_ROOT}/summary.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "run_id": "${RUN_ID}",
+  "connector": "fcp-mysql",
+  "artifacts_root": "${OUT_ROOT}",
+  "artifacts": {
+    "manifest_check": "${OUT_ROOT}/evidence/manifest_check.json",
+    "cargo_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/cargo_check.log",
+    "format_check_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/format_check.log",
+    "doctor_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/doctor_evidence.log",
+    "self_check_secretless_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/self_check_secretless_evidence.log",
+    "compliance_evidence_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/compliance_evidence.log",
+    "integration_suite_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/integration_suite.log",
+    "clippy_log": "${OUT_ROOT}/logs/clippy.log",
+    "environment": "${OUT_ROOT}/environment.json",
+    "replay": "${OUT_ROOT}/replay.sh"
+  }
+}
+EOF
+
+echo "MySQL verification artifacts written to ${OUT_ROOT}"
